all_gaps.title: [correctness] readLedger full-file→256KB tail breaks behavior-preserving split
all_gaps.description: ledger-scan.readLedger was reported to call eventReader.readRecentEvents (256KB tail) instead of full events.jsonl read + partial-tail drop.
all_gaps.fix_direction: Restore full-file readLedger semantics (Port main-branch full readFileSync + trailing-newline pop into ledger-scan.readLedger); keep tail helper only for intentional bounded readers.
all_gaps.current_code_state: ALREADY_FIXED_IN_WORKTREE: readLedger uses readFileSync full-file + pop last line when no trailing newline; comments document contrast vs event-reader.readRecentEvents. Needs verification tests + issue close, not reimplementation.

all_gaps.title: [correctness] JSONL partial-tail drop semantics inverted after extract
all_gaps.description: Old readLedger dropped last line when file lacked trailing newline; parseJsonlEvents was keeping parseable last lines; fabric-hint tests describe partial-tail drop.
all_gaps.fix_direction: Align readLedger path with intended contract and update tests (coupled with 036).
all_gaps.current_code_state: ALREADY_FIXED_IN_WORKTREE: parseJsonlEvents drops final fragment when raw lacks trailing newline. Needs contract tests + issue close.

all_gaps.title: [security] transcript_path unsandboxed arbitrary file read in summarizeTranscript
all_gaps.description: transcript-summary.summarizeTranscript reads stdin transcript_path with no root/realpath allowlist; content can flow to digests/events.
all_gaps.fix_direction: Allowlist absolute paths under known client transcript roots; realpath prefix check; size/suffix limits.
all_gaps.current_code_state: STILL_OPEN: existsSync + readFileSync(transcriptPath) with no sandbox.

all_gaps.title: [architecture] plan-context-scoring secondary god module (802 LOC)
all_gaps.description: ISS-011 thinned facade to 722 LOC but scoring is 802 LOC mixing context build, fusion, factors, rank/cut, relatedLookupKeys. Debt relocated more than decomposed.
all_gaps.fix_direction: Further slice score-factors / rank-core / id-graph; keep buildScoringContext as assembly.
all_gaps.current_code_state: STILL_OPEN: 802 LOC; exports ScoringContext, buildScoringContext, RankMode, RankOptions, cutRankedForRecall, rankDescriptionItems, scoreBreakdownForItem, relatedLookupKeys.

all_gaps.title: [architecture] Dual rank-cut + dual RankMode/RankOptions SSOT break
all_gaps.description: cutRankedForRecall reimplements topK+floor; RankMode/RankOptions declared in both plan-context-rank.ts and plan-context-scoring.ts. plan-context.ts imports/uses cutRankedForRecall.
all_gaps.fix_direction: Single cut implementation via applyRankCapAndFloor; types only in plan-context-rank.ts re-exported by facade.
all_gaps.current_code_state: STILL_OPEN: cutRankedForRecall body duplicates applyRankCapAndFloor; rankDescriptionItems already delegates to applyRankCapAndFloor; dual type exports remain.

all_gaps.description: Only ledger/pending/import/transcript extracted; decide/main/config/dismiss/cite emit remain. Residual is incomplete split not thin orchestrator.
all_gaps.fix_direction: Next extract signal-decide, hint-config, session-signal-state, assistant-turn-emit; migrate tests toward lib/*.
